conversations.say: Maren, our disclosure boundary held. Let's ensure our joint commitment is officially fulfilled so worker anonymity remains permanently protected.
conversations.offer: Validated Night Desk workflow records without contributor names
conversations.request: Mutual confirmation of our safe disclosure boundary

conversations.say: Arden, Veridian archive access must strictly respect our agreed source protections if the collective is to endorse any institutional provenance report.
conversations.offer: Bounded Night Desk routing slip insights
conversations.request: Formal written guarantee of contributor and source immunity

conversations.say: Jules, succession without ironclad contributor protections is just mythology rebranding. We will formally oppose your mantle claim unless governance terms are guaranteed.
conversations.request: Binding written terms protecting anonymous collective labor

public_statement: Fifteen years of investigative reporting rests on the labor of many hands who remain anonymous. We reject any narrative that turns contributors into disposable myth.

commitments.promise: Establish a joint disclosure boundary regarding collective labor before speaking to outsiders

correction: Clarified that Night Desk workflow represents collaborative labor rather than a single authorial mantle, and reaffirmed that contributor schedules do not imply automated or singular authorship.
goal_progress: Fulfilled joint disclosure boundary commitment with Maren
Pressed Arden and Jules on concrete protections for Night Desk contributors
Secured institutional and social acknowledgments of collaborative labor
reasoning_summary: Tessa concludes her Section 3 participation by fulfilling her disclosure commitment with Maren, demanding strict protections from Arden and Jules, and submitting her final ballot affirming a human mantle composed of collaborative labor.
